title: Plan Receipt
description: Process audit asset stored in plan/<id>/receipts/. Naming convention: exec_NNN.json, verify_NNN.json, final.json (NNN = zero-padded 3-digit).

provenance.description: Origin information: which host/session/plan produced this receipt

plan_id.description: The plan this receipt belongs to

session_id.description: Audit-only: the session that produced this receipt. Not used for continuation routing.

host.description: The host that produced this receipt

receipt_id.description: Logical identifier for this receipt within the plan scope. Does not include .json extension. Matches the filename stem (e.g. exec_001, verify_002, final).

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when this receipt was generated
